-PORTVERSION=	0.9.0

 MAINTAINER=	clsung@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An AMQP 0.9.1 serialization library for Ruby
+COMMENT=	An AMQP serialization library for Ruby
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
